3328660.name: Elnea Kingdom - Challenge Dungeons
3328660.description:
The two Challenge Dungeons, which were individual DLC on the Nintendo Switch™ version, are now available as a set!

This is a fantastic value DLC pack that also includes lots of outfits, weapons, and monster figurines!

This DLC includes the following items:

  • Two New Dungeons

Two high-difficulty dungeons, Hellfire Lair and Sunken Ruins, can be accessed via the warp gate on the left side of Elnea Castle.

These dungeons offer various rewards, including skills, Enchants, exclusive outfits, materials, and collectible monster figures.

  • 144 New Weapon Types

A wide variety of 144 different weapons will be added to Martial Arts Muscle Hall in Yano Market.

  • 94 New Monster Figures

94 types of collectible monster figures will be added to the Figure Shop in Old Town Riverside.

※ This content can only be purchased once per account.

※ If you uninstall the DLC after saving, that save data will no longer be loadable.

※ The base game (sold separately) is required to use this content.

Please ensure your game is updated to the latest version if necessary.
